name: SetThreshold1_8
title: SetThreshold1_8
description: Sets the threshold value for differentiating between high and low levels of the channels 1…8 of a digital module VT2516.There is only one threshold setting for all eight channels together.Voltages at the input exceeding this threshold value are evaluated as high level and voltages undershooting it are evaluated as low level.

parameters.name: Threshold
parameters.description: Voltage value in volts in the range from 0…25 V.

description: The following example demonstrates how to measure a PWM signal on a VT2516 channel (e.g. a ECU output that controls an LED). The measured frequency and duty cycle is then output to the Write Window / the test report.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
